description.value: Aura faint illusion; CL 5th; Slot head; Price 3,500 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION Preserved sections harvested from several different human faces cover this mask. When worn, the mask desaturates the wearerâs color, making him appear shadowy and granting a +5 competence bonus on Stealth checks. Once per day as a full-round action, the wearer can cause the maskâs features to take on the appearance of any creature of the wearerâs basic size and shape within 60 feet that he observes, allowing the wearer to adopt that creatureâs appearance for 1 hour. This grants him a +10 bonus on Disguise checks made to appear as the creature. The mask also grants the wearer a +1 bonus on attack rolls and weapon damage rolls made against the creature he is disguised as, as the mask builds upon the wearerâs rage and jealousy of the targetâs appearance. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, disguise self, rage; Cost 1,750 gp.
